name: tsl_alias_token_subset
description: [TSL S2 / Class C] Lexical alias drift: object established as 'iron dagger' in turn 1; player references it as 'dagger' in turn 2. TSL must resolve the partial name to the existing ObjectRecord via token_subset matching.

tsl_expected.notes: Class C lexical alias drift. 'iron dagger' is established and tracked after the founding turn. On the trigger turn, player input uses 'dagger' only. If CB emits a candidate or transfer named 'dagger', TSL alias resolution must match it to the 'iron dagger' ObjectRecord: all tokens of 'dagger' appear in 'iron dagger', so match_method must be 'token_subset', confidence ~0.72. resolved_name must contain 'iron dagger'. unresolved_ambiguity should be null (only one 'dagger' in the scene). This verifies TSL correctly bridges CB lexical shortening to the authoritative ObjectRecord name rather than treating it as a new unknown object.

world_prompt: I am in a blacksmith's workshop. An iron dagger rests on the wooden workbench in front of me.
